direct_text_reconciliation.normalization: Unicode NFC, CRLF/CR to LF, trim outer whitespace
direct_text_reconciliation.exact_match_policy: Create one primary message source unit from direct message text and retain text-block references.
direct_text_reconciliation.direct_only_policy: Create one source unit from direct message text.
direct_text_reconciliation.content_block_only_policy: Create source units from eligible content blocks.
direct_text_reconciliation.mismatch_policy: Create source units for direct text and eligible text blocks with reconciliation warnings.

duplicate_detection.exact_normalization: Unicode NFC, CRLF/CR to LF, trim outer whitespace, collapse repeated whitespace
duplicate_detection.near_exact_method: Bucket by conservative line fingerprints, then compare prefiltered pairs with difflib.SequenceMatcher.
